title: Enhanced Equipment
description: Full makeover to all sets of equipment to uniquely match their theme!
body:
### A full tool makeover aiming to add clarity and polish while blending in with the game!

It is strongly recommended you check out the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-equipment/gallery) to see what this pack offers!

***

**All of the colors have been sourced from existing vanilla textures, such as:**
- Respective materials for tool tiers (diamond, gold, etc.)

- Spruce wood for sticks

- Iron and string for the bow and fishing rod

- Vanilla Tweaks darker leather for the upperclass handles and the bow

**Just to name a few.**

***

**Each tier of tools have different styles/palettes of their own, to match how they would realistically look:**

- **Wooden tools** - Primitive and crudely constructed, made out of whittled sticks and planks

- **Stone tools** - Rough and jagged, cobbled together rocks attached to a stick

- **Copper tools** - Cold-forged utilitarian tools meant to be reliable but expendable

- **Iron tools** - Classic and refined tools made with intention and purpose

- **Golden tools** - Beautiful tools meant to glisten, with ornamented handles

- **Diamond tools** - Top tier of tools, combining both golden tools' form and iron tools' function

- **Netherite tools** - The true apex of all tools, with unique and sharp designs for each, a golden ornament, a crimson handle, and a netherite grip to protect from burns

***

**Overall, my goal with this is to capture the spirit of tools, challenge what makes them unique and loved, and amplify their traits. Enjoy!**
